figures.caption: Figure 5: Pairwise task correlations based on VLM performance. Higher values suggest that VLMs perform more similarly on the two tasks, indicating a greater overlap in the abilities required to solve them.

Table 2: Results (%) on LinkS2Bench for existing various VLMs on 12 task types across 4 evaluation dimensions. The former section shows existing popular models’ results. The latter section demonstrates model adaption experimental results.
